---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AkiraOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<div align="center">
<img src="../assets/logo.png" alt="AkiraOS Logo" width="150"/>
</div>

## Feature Description
**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.**

## Problem/Use Case
**What problem does this feature solve? Or what use case does it enable?**

## Proposed Solution
**Describe how you envision this feature working.**

## Alternatives Considered
**Have you considered alternative approaches? Describe them here.**

## Target Platform
- [ ] ESP32-S3
- [ ] ESP32
- [ ] ESP32-C3
- [ ] Native Simulation
- [ ] nRF54L15
- [ ] STM32
- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] Other: _________

## Implementation Details
**If you have technical implementation ideas, share them here.**

## Benefits
**What are the main benefits of implementing this feature?**

## Potential Drawbacks
**Are there any potential drawbacks or challenges?**

## Additional Context
**Screenshots, diagrams, or links to related projects/documentation.**

---

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with AkiraOS's core principles (security, performance, modularity)
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to the implementation (optional)
